code: const API_URL="http://127.0.0.1:8000";export const getTasks=async()=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks`);const data=await response.json();return data.tasks;};export const createTask=async task=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks`,{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(task)});return await response.json();};export const completeTask=async id=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks/${id}/complete`,{method:"PUT"});return await response.json();};export const deleteTask=async id=>{const response=await fetch(`${API_URL}/tasks/${id}`,{method:"DELETE"});return await response.json();};
